title: bauhinia hendersonii
intro: Bauhinia hendersonii, also known as Henderson's orchid tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant is native to the island of Tahiti and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bauhinia hendersonii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, making it a valuable resource in folk medicine. Bauhinia hendersonii is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
